title: brachyscome cuneata
intro: Brachyscome cuneata, also known as the wedged brachyscome, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant's medicinal properties also provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting digestion. Brachyscome cuneata is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health issues, and it is also sometimes used in topical applications to aid in wound healing.
